concerns.text: The plan describes the workflow (e.g., download FASTQ, alignment, PSI quantification) but never explicitly names the data‑model entities defined in data‑model.md (RNASeqSample, SplicingEvent, EnrichmentResult). To satisfy the Plan ↔ Data‑Model consistency check, the plan should reference these entity names when describing the corresponding phases (e.g., “Phase 1 creates RNASeqSample records”, “Phase 4 outputs SplicingEvent TSV”, “Phase 7‑9 produce EnrichmentResult records”).
